title: Sabo’s Memory and Fujitora’s Choice — Part 2
description: Sabo reflects on Ace and Luffy while Fujitora confronts the truth of Dressrosa.
scene: On pages 8–12, Luffy, Sabo, Dressrosa Citizens, Straw Hat Pirates, Trafalgar Law deal with the aftermath of Dressrosa, with the Marines, allies, and citizens responding to the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So you really were completely amnesia!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The only thing clear to me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: was that I, at no cost, wanted to return to my parents.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I didn't remember anything else...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Wow, good thing your memories eventually returned.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: ACE filled me in on everything.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That's what I've come to realize.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: "You're SABO! Luffy's brother!" he said.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: His timing couldn't have been any worse, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I guess that's exactly why... He actually brought it all back for me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The latest news about the "war of the greatest" are hot off the presses!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: There's even an article about Whitebeard's defeat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Is IVA-San okay!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: He isn't listed among the fatali- ties...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Those who passed away are...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: the yonkou, whitebeard, and...

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Fire Fist Ace!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: More importantly... look at this! Dragon- San...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Is this true!? Are you really Straw Hat Luffy's Father!? You gotta be SHITTin' me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: I'm gonna become a pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Hmm? Oh. yeah.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: What- AAT!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: I'm gonna become a pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Then I'm gonna become a bigshot pirate! I'm gonna show the world!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Sabo-kun, what's the matter? You're acting weirder than usual...

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Apparently ace was... ran through by Akainu!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Hey, guys, did you know?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: If you exchange vows over a cup of sake with someone, you become brothers!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: That's right...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: WaaaA AAAAA AGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGG

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Sabo- Kun!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: The person who was killed... isn't some nameless pirate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Not some must-eliminate major player in the pirate age...

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: ACE IS...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: My brother!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: I ain't gonna run from anyone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: And I sure as hell ain't gonna lose to anyone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: The Chief of Staff's awake!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: SERSI- Ously!? What a relief!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: WAAAAAAAHH! We thought you were gonna die, SABO-Kun...

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: You had an incredible fever, SABO. You were out for three days straight. You had us really worried!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Did your memories come back!? Are you gonna quit the Revo- Lutionary Army!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: No. No, I'm not...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Is Dragon- San here? There are some things I'd like to talk to him about.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Also...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Two years later, dress- Rosa

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: I'd like to ask this of the revolutionary army.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: There is a certain devil fruit that I simply must have.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: There's no way I can give you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: The Mera Mera No mi!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Straw Hat Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: And who the fuck are you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: You got some nerve addressing Luffy-senpai so directly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: It's me, Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Hm? Who is "me"!? The Mera Mera No mi...

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Is a memento of ace's! If you want it, you're my enemy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: Also, you keep calling me Luffy, but you're mistaken! Look closely at this beard!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: There's no way I'd fail to recognize my little brother. Even if he's wearing a disguise.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: I'm Lucy!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: little brother? The only people who ever called me their little brother was ace and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: Someone who passed away a really long time ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Someone who doesn't

summary: This part follows the consequences of Dressrosa’s liberation and shows how the victory changes the country and the wider world.
